text.title: pm-tools-overview Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for pm-tools-overview as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using Jira for a team of fewer than 10 with straightforward Kanban needs.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Jira's configuration overhead (workflows, schemes, custom fields) creates administrative burden that kills small-team productivity.

failure-mode.description: Choosing Linear when stakeholders need heavy customization, large ecosystem apps, or mature reporting.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Linear's opinionated design is a liability when teams need workflow customization that Linear does not support out of the box.

failure-mode.description: POC driven only by API scenarios without any UI testing.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: API success does not predict UI adoption. One Playwright test per shortlisted vendor covering the most common UI flow catches issues that break real adoption.

failure-mode.description: Using LLM training knowledge for current feature availability or pricing tiers.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Vendor pricing pages and tier names change quarterly. Require evidence from trial instance or dated changelog, never from LLM priors.

failure-mode.description: Accepting compliance attestations from a badge or marketing page.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: SOC2, ISO27001 badges without the actual audit report are unverifiable. Require signed security questionnaire (SIG Lite or CAIQ) before shortlisting.

failure-mode.description: Letting an agent submit an RFP response or sign a DPA.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Procurement actions with legal consequences require human authorization. Agents produce drafts only.
